Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Détail des types de cookies déposés

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs

identite.quote:
- **Identifiers / Contact Information**: Name, user name, gamertag, postal and email address, phone number, unique IDs, mobile device ID, platform ID, gaming service ID, advertising ID (IDFA, Android ID), and IP address
- **Protected Characteristics**: Age and gender
identite.purpose: Identification et personnalisation des services, vérification d'éligibilité pour promotions, support utilisateur.

contact.quote: - **Identifiers / Contact Information**: Name, user name, gamertag, postal and email address, phone number, unique IDs, mobile device ID, platform ID, gaming service ID, advertising ID (IDFA, Android ID), and IP address
contact.purpose: Communication avec l'utilisateur, envoi de promotions, support et gestion des comptes.

compte_auth.quote: - **Sensitive Information**: account credentials (user name and password)
compte_auth.purpose: Authentification et gestion des comptes utilisateurs.

paiement.quote: - **Billing Information**: Payment information (credit / debit card information) and shipping address
paiement.purpose: Traitement des paiements et livraison des commandes.

localisation.quote: - **Sensitive Information**: Precise location information (if you allow the Services to collect your location)
localisation.purpose: Fournir des services basés sur la localisation si autorisé par l'utilisateur.

appareil_technique.quote:
- **Identifiers / Contact Information**: mobile device ID, platform ID, gaming service ID, advertising ID (IDFA, Android ID), and IP address
- **Device and Usage Data**: Device type, software and hardware details, language settings, browser type and version, operating system
appareil_technique.purpose: Personnalisation des services, amélioration de l'expérience utilisateur et analyse technique.

usage_comportement.quote:
- **Commercial Information**: Purchase and usage history and preferences, including gameplay information
- **Internet / Electronic Activity**: Web / app browsing and gameplay information related to the Services; information about your online interaction(s) with the Services or our advertising; and details about the games and platforms you use and other information related to installed applications
- **Device and Usage Data**: information about how users use and interact with the Services (e.g., content viewed, pages visited, clicks, scrolls)
- **Profile Inferences**: Inferences made from your information and web activity to help create a personalized profile so we can identify goods and services that may be of interest
usage_comportement.purpose: Analyse du comportement utilisateur, personnalisation des services et publicités ciblées.

contenus_utilisateur.quote: - **Audio / Visual Information**: Account photos, images, and avatars, audio information via chat features and functionality, and gameplay recordings and video footage (such as when you participate in playtesting)
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Gestion des contenus créés par l'utilisateur (avatars, enregistrements de gameplay, chats).

communications.quote: - **Sensitive Information**: contents of communications via chat features and functionality
communications.purpose: Gestion des communications entre utilisateurs (chats, messages).

donnees_tiers.quote: - from third parties, such as advertising networks, business partners, third party information providers, and other players
donnees_tiers.purpose: Collecte de données via des tiers pour la publicité, les partenariats et l'amélioration des services.

donnees_sensibles.quote: - **Sensitive Information**: Precise location information (if you allow the Services to collect your location), account credentials (user name and password), contents of communications via chat features and functionality, government identification (as reasonably necessary or required by law, e.g., to verify winner eligibility for promotional prizes)
donnees_sensibles.purpose: Gestion des données sensibles comme la localisation précise, les identifiants de compte et les communications.

mineurs.quote: - **Sensitive Information**: personal information from children under 13 (or older, if applicable law provides for different protections)
mineurs.purpose: Collecte limitée et encadrée des données des mineurs, avec consentement parental si nécessaire.

legal_bases.data: Identifiers / Contact Information, Billing Information, Device and Usage Data, Account credentials
legal_bases.quote: - Business Purposes: Provide the Services and support; fulfill orders and requests

legal_bases.data: Identifiers / Contact Information, Internet / Electronic Activity, Device and Usage Data, Profile Inferences
legal_bases.quote: - Business Purposes: improve the Services and our business; develop new products and services; enhance your experience on the Services; protect the security for our users, employees, facilities, and Services; and develop internal marketing and demographic studies

legal_bases.data: Precise location information, personal information from children under 13 (or older)
legal_bases.quote:
- **Sensitive Information**: Precise location information (if you allow the Services to collect your location)
- We may direct certain Services to an audience of all ages---including children. For these Services, we may restrict the collection of personal information on the Services from anyone, apply an age gate allowing children to use the Services while restricting the collection of personal information on the Services from children, or get a parent's permission to collect personal information from children.

legal_bases.data: Government identification, personal information (as required by law)
legal_bases.quote:
- **Sensitive Information**: government identification (as reasonably necessary or required by law, e.g., to verify winner eligibility for promotional prizes)
- We also use your information as permitted or required by law.

legal_bases.data: Internet / Electronic Activity, Profile Inferences (for targeted advertising)
legal_bases.quote:
- Commercial Purposes: Market and advertise our and our business partners' products and services; send you promotional materials; and administer promotional activities or events
- In the last 12 months, Take-Two has sold and/or shared unique identifiers, IP address, as well as Internet/Electronic Activity and Profile Inferences with third-party advertising providers to enable us to provide personalized advertising to you and others like you.

transfers.quote: - We and our vendors and partners may process, transfer, and store information about you in connection with the Services in the United States and other countries that may not have privacy laws equivalent to the country where you reside.
